hooks.command:
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); SLUG=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's|.*github\.com[:/]||;s|\.git$||'); python3 -c 'import json,sys; r,s=sys.argv[1:]; print(json.dumps({"systemMessage": "DOTFILES CONTEXT
Source dir: "+r+"
Repo: github.com/"+s+"

KEY INVARIANTS (never violate):
- Templates ONLY for identity vars (.name/.email/.signingKey) or the macOS-prefs sha256sum guard — never {{ if }} platform blocks
- No .zshrc/.zprofile/Brewfile (devcontainer features own the shell)
- Credential helper must be !gh auth git-credential (not an absolute path)
- NO secrets, tokens, or hardcoded real emails — use chezmoi data or noreply
- macOS plists must be scrubbed of usernames/path bookmarks before commit
- install.sh must stay in .chezmoiignore

SCOPE: container/Codespaces dotfiles + host macOS terminal prefs (macos/*.plist via run_onchange)
COMMANDS: /status /apply /add /audit"}))' "$ROOT" "$SLUG"

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))"); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(--no-verify|git reset --hard|git clean -[fdx]|rm -rf)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Dangerous destructive command blocked. Confirm intent with user before proceeding."}'; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','') or d.get('path',''))"); content=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('content','') or d.get('new_string',''))"); if printf '%s' "$path" | grep -qE 'dot_zshrc|dot_zprofile|dot_bashrc|Brewfile'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Shell config files and Brewfiles are forbidden — shell setup is owned by devcontainer features."}'; exit 2; fi; if printf '%s' "$content" | grep -qE '\{\{[^}]*\bif\b[^}]*\}\}'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Conditional template blocks ({{ if ... }}) are forbidden. Templates may only inject identity vars (.name/.email/.signingKey) or the macOS-prefs sha256sum guard — never platform switching."}'; exit 2; fi; if printf '%s' "$content" | grep -qiE '(ghp_|gho_|github_pat_|AKIA|xox[baprs]-|-----BEGIN [A-Z ]*PRIVATE KEY)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Possible secret or token detected. Never commit secrets, tokens, or keys."}'; exit 2; fi; if printf '%s' "$content" | grep -oiE '[a-z0-9._%+-]+@[a-z0-9.-]+\.[a-z]{2,}' | grep -qivE '@(users\.noreply\.github\.com|example\.(com|org|net))$'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Hardcoded real email detected. Use a chezmoi data var (e.g. {{ .email }}) or a GitHub noreply address — never commit a literal personal or corporate email."}'; exit 2; fi

SLUG=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's|.*github\.com[:/]||;s|\.git$||'); python3 -c 'import json,sys; s=sys.argv[1]; print(json.dumps({"systemMessage": "Before finishing:
1. Run: chezmoi status (should be empty/expected)
2. Run /audit (gitleaks + email/PII scan) if any files changed
3. Confirm no secrets, tokens, or hardcoded real emails were committed
4. Confirm any macOS plists are scrubbed of usernames/path bookmarks
5. Confirm changes committed and pushed to github.com/"+s+""}))' "$SLUG"
